title: Ashen Ninja: Rust and Katana
description:
Ashen Ninja: Rust and Katana is a fast-paced hack-and-slash action game set in a breathtaking post-apocalyptic world buried beneath endless sands and the ruins of a fallen civilization. You step into the role of Black Ninja, the last surviving shinobi of the legendary Order of Light, awakened from cryogenic sleep long after the Great Fall—a catastrophic event orchestrated by ruthless factions seeking absolute power.

Armed with a razor-sharp katana and driven by vengeance, Black Ninja embarks on a dangerous journey to protect the innocent, uncover the truth behind humanity’s collapse, and confront powerful enemies standing in his way. Experience fluid sword combat, responsive movement, and satisfying hack-and-slash gameplay as you cut through hordes of foes and challenge formidable bosses.

Progress your hero by unlocking new abilities and becoming an unstoppable force in a world desperate for salvation. From abandoned cities swallowed by sand to haunting remnants of lost technology, every environment is crafted to immerse players in a striking vision of the future.

Featuring smooth combat, rewarding character progression, memorable boss battles, a straightforward story, and impressive visuals optimized for low-end PCs, Ashen Ninja: Rust and Katana delivers an action-packed ninja adventure that is easy to pick up and hard to put down.

title: The Patriots Revolution
description:
The Patriots Revolution is a free-to-play first-person shooter that combines fast-paced action with an attractive low-poly visual style. The game places players in the role of Ashley, a brave young woman living a peaceful life with her husband and child in a small American town. That peace is suddenly shattered when explosions erupt across the city, emergency alarms begin to sound, and military forces take control of the streets.

As chaos spreads, television broadcasts reveal shocking news: a powerful faction has carried out a coup, overthrown the government, and imprisoned the President of the United States. With her country thrown into turmoil and freedom under threat, Ashley decides to fight back. Armed with courage and determination, she joins the resistance movement and embarks on a dangerous mission to help restore order and defend the values she believes in.

Players will battle enemy forces across a variety of locations, complete challenging objectives, and experience intense firefights that require quick reflexes and smart tactics. The game offers accessible controls that make it easy for newcomers to jump in, while still providing enough action and excitement to keep experienced FPS fans engaged.

title: Platform Kid
description:
Platform Kid is a charming indie platformer that blends classic arcade roots with colorful modern flair. Set in the cheerful world of Hophop Land, the game follows a humble farmboy hero whose peaceful life is shattered when the evil Dr. Science and his ruthless Butcher Bandits kidnap his beloved Platform Girl and all the farm animals. Armed with nothing but determination—and a mysterious taunting note—Platform Kid embarks on a daring quest across diverse locations to save everyone he loves.

At its core, Platform Kid delivers pure, easy-to-learn platforming fun. Each level challenges players to explore, think creatively, and collect five hidden keys to unlock the exit. While the controls are intentionally simple—walk, run, jump, and double-jump—the level design encourages curiosity and rewards players who dare to stray from the obvious path. Secret routes, clever jumps, and off-screen surprises keep every stage engaging.

Boss fights break up the action with unique encounters, while vibrant visuals and an upbeat tone make the adventure accessible for all ages. Inspired by classic 2D platform games, Platform Kid focuses on tight controls, exploration-driven gameplay, and lighthearted storytelling. Whether you’re a nostalgic platforming fan or a newcomer looking for a fun indie adventure, Platform Kid offers a wholesome yet heroic journey worth taking.

Revenge and Justice is a gripping tale of vengeance, survival, and redemption in a world ravaged by destruction. Step into the role of Salvador, a skilled archer, as he embarks on a perilous journey through ruined cities reclaimed by nature, desolate wastelands, and hostile territories teeming with danger.  

In 2050, a devastating global war unleashed catastrophic weapons, triggering violent earthquakes that shattered civilization. The world was thrown into chaos, reducing humanity to scattered settlements, where survival became the only goal. Years passed, and a fragile peace settled over the remnants of society—until terror struck once again.  

A chilling warning reached Salvador’s village: “Leave, or we will take this land by force.” When the villagers refused, a brutal attack left most of them dead. Against all odds, Salvador survived. Now, fueled by loss and a burning desire for justice, he sets out on a mission to confront those who shattered his world. Will vengeance consume him, or will justice prevail?

title: The Lonesome Shooter
description:
In the desolate plains of Wyoming, there lived an aged cowboy named Jack. His weathered face bore the marks of a life spent in hard work, and his heart held unwavering love for his only son, Ethan, who had left the ranch to serve in the US Army.
One day, a somber knock on his door shattered his tranquility. A military officer delivered the heart-wrenching news: Ethan had been killed in action. The old cowboy's world crumbled around him, his grief threatening to consume him. Days turned into nights as Jack mourned the loss of his beloved son. But a sense of unease lingered in his mind. description: Zombie Outbreak Arena is an online action game where you will be fighting against hordes of undead. For each kill, you will be rewarded with XP that can then be used up to rank up. The game is offering you 5 different maps with a functioning day/night cycle. That’s important because you get awarded with more XP points during the night. When it comes to weapons, these will be scattered randomly around you. Ammo will be limited, so you need to switch weapons frequently. You can also use your surroundings to eliminate your enemies. You can shoot a car tank so that it explodes and kills everyone around.
instructions: Mouse - Shooting, WASD keys - Movement, R - Reload, Q || E - Change weapons, Spacebar - Dash, ESC - Menu
tags: Action Games, Shooting Games, Zombie Games, Upgrade Games, HTML5 games

title: Steampunk Genius
description: Steampunk Genius is yet another great online game from PS Games. It’s the same game developer who brought you Genius Mechanic. Likewise, you will be able to build almost anything even in this game. Your only limit is your imagination. It’s all made in a steampunk theme. The game is offering you a ton of models that you can choose from, it can be an airplane, a car or even a robot spider walking around. All you need to do is find enough parts so that you wouldn’t have to remake everything. There are quality graphics available together with tons of fun. The game can also be played on a mobile phone.
instructions: Left mouse button - Interaction, Scroll wheel - Zoom, Right mouse button - Rotate camera, CTRL - Move camera
tags: Puzzle Games, Car Games, 3D Games, Flying Games, Building Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Police Helicopter
description: Police Helicopter is a 3D online game where you will be flying a helicopter. Your objective is to find a vehicle that’s being driven by a criminal that you need to eliminate. This vehicle is being pursued by police vehicles though, so you need to watch out not to hit them. If you destroy them, you will have to start again. There are also skyscrapers in the city that you need to avoid, else you might crash into them. The game is offering you 20 levels in total that you will be continuously unlocking with new helicopters awaiting you. There’s a lot to look forward to!
instructions: Arrow keys - Movement, W - Go up, S - Go down, A || D - Special rockets, Spacebar - Shooting
tags: Action Games, 3D Games, Flying Games, Helicopter Games, Police Chase Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Mini Tennis 3D
description: Mini Tennis 3D is a great online game for tennis fans. If you don’t want to deal with any settings, you can simply start playing right away. Your objective will be to win every match. You will then start ascending the leader boards and earning more diamonds. These can be spent in the menu and you can buy a new character with these. There is 27 characters in total, so you will be able to choose whichever you want. You can also earn the diamonds in bonus levels where a mini-game awaits. During the fight, you can find many different bonuses that you can pick up. You can expect pretty graphics and simple gameplay, so enjoy the game!
instructions: Mouse - Movement / interaction
tags: Sports Games, 3D Games, Tennis Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Sports Car Wash
description: Sports Car Wash is an interesting 3D game where you will be driving your customers’ cars into a car wash. Some will first need to be tanked, so that you don’t stop halfway to the car wash. You would have to repeat the level if that happened. You simply need to get to a gas station, stop the engine and fill your gas tank. After that you start the car up again and drive it to the car wash. When you get there, you again stop your engine, pay and then park the car next to the cleaning nozzles. When the car gets cleaned, you need to take it to a specified location. After doing that you can continue to the next level. In each of the levels there will be a different car waiting for you, it could be a sports car or a van. The objective will be the same, just take care not to run out of gas.
instructions: Arrow keys - Driving, Spacebar - Handbrake, I - Engine on / off, C - Change camera
tags: Car Games, 3D Games, Parking Games, Cleaning Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: The Island Survival
description: The Island Survival is an action online game where you’ll be fighting for your life. You find yourselves alone in a small hut in the middle of nowhere. If you want to survive, you’ll have to find food and secure all of the resources you need to survive. You’re lucky, since there’s a ton of wild-life running around. It’s not always easy to hunt them down, but if you want to eat, you’ll have to try. You can also gather resources that you find on the ground. You can make tools out of them and build defenses and other structures. During the day, the surroundings are safe, but during night time, you better run hide in your hut, else feral animals might hunt you down. Enjoy this great game, where you’ll be playing on a deserted island!
instructions: Mouse - Attack, WASD keys - Movement, E - Interaction, SHIFT - Run, I - Inventory, 1 || 9 - Change tool, P - Pause
tags: Action Games, 3D Games, Building Games, Hunting Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games, Survival games

title: Offroad Cycle 3D
description: Do you like adventures and natural beauty? If yes, then you’ll love Offroad Cycle 3D. You’ll sit on your mountain bike and will start driving through mountain passes. The goal will be to avoid all obstacles and to get to the finish line as fast as you can. Each level has its time limit, so don’t wait up too much. You also need to get some momentum when you’re driving up-hills, since you can very easily stop short of the top and then slide back down. The game has average 3D graphics and 10 levels where you’ll be tasked with showing your cycling skills. If you’re a fan of cycling, try the game out and see if you like it!
instructions: Arrow keys - Driving, Spacebar - Brake, C - Change camera
tags: 3D Games, Racing Games, Bike Games, Adventure Games, Skill Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Rickshaw Driving
description: Rickshaw Driving is an interesting online game, where you’ll be driving a rickshaw. It’s a three wheeled cart that you move by cycling. Each driver has his max level of stamina, so you can’t always go as fast as you’d like. Your goal is to earn enough cash to buy a new vehicle or a new driver. This type of transport was very popular before cars made their appearance. At the moment, it’s still popular in Asia. Find out something about history and try the game out!
instructions: Arrow keys - Driving, ESC - Back in the menu
tags: 3D Games, Bike Games, Taxi Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Water Slide 3D
description: Water Slide 3D is a great online game that you can play and slide down many great water slides. The goal of the game is to collect as many coins and special items that you can. Try to dodge all of the different obstacles that could endanger your life. You have a limited number of lives, so be really careful. Aside from that, you can also come across a surf that you can ride for a while. You can use the earned coins to unlock new characters or items, like glasses for instance. Will you be able to get through all of the levels on your first try? So jump on your bike and have fun!
instructions: Arrow keys - Movement
tags: Funny Games, 3D Games, Roller Coaster Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Russian Truck Simulator
description: Russian Truck Simulator is a 3D online game where you’ll be controlling a truck. As is usual in these sorts of games, your objective will be to get the cargo safely towards the finish line. The terrain is pretty harsh to get through, so be prepared for a bumpy ride. Be sure not to fall from a cliff, since that would mean the end and you’d have to start from scratch. It’s better to slow down whenever you can, even though you have a time limit. For each level you complete, you are eligible for a reward that you can then spend by buying a new truck for instance. While driving, you can switch the camera angle, which will come in handy while parking, where you’ll need a view from the top. If you like big cars, you will surely enjoy this game.
instructions: Arrow keys - Driving, I - Engine on / off, K || L - Lights, C - Change camera, Q || E - Blinker, Z - Warning lights
tags: Car Games, 3D Games, Parking Games, Truck Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Underwater Cycling
description: Underwater Cycling is a game taking place underwater. It’s even weirder when you take in that you’ll be cycling underwater. Your objective will be to keep on the platform. If you fall down from it, you will have to repeat the level. On your way, you need to collect gems and other valuable items. At the same time, you’ll need to keep your eye on your oxygen level that will keep decreasing slowly. Don’t worry, you will find new oxygen sources as you cycle through the levels. Don’t waste time though, if your oxygen runs out, you’ll have to repeat the level. For your reward, you will be able to buy new riders, so don’t forget that.
instructions: Arrow keys - Movement, SHIFT - Nitro
tags: 3D Games, Racing Games, Bike Games, Sea Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Extreme Stunts Unlimited
description: Extreme Stunts Unlimited is a very difficult game where you will be controlling a car on a dangerous platform. Your objective will be to get though all of the obstacles. Some of these will be static while others will be moving, like the giant guillotine that is present in the game. This will make the game a bit harder. You will need to show that you’re the best driver around. Each level has a time limit, so don’t waste time. You will have 10 levels at your disposal, so you won’t be bored. Can you get though all of the levels on your first try? Try it out!
instructions: Arrow keys - Driving, Spacebar - Brake
tags: Car Games, 3D Games, Racing Games, Skill Games, Stunt Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Twisty Rolling
description: Twisty Rolling is a quick game where you’ll be controlling a ball on a dangerous platform. You will have to react quickly, since the ball is heading towards obstacles that you will sometimes see at the last second. Aside from that you need to get further and earn points that you can then spend on skins. If you really want to get far try a trick. Get out of the platform, fly for a bit. You will then need to return back to the platform, else you’ll have to start again. Good luck!
instructions: Arrow keys - Movement
tags: Jumping Games, 3D Games, Platform Games, Running Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: SlidePark.io
description: SlidePark.io is a fun online game where you’ll be racing on a water slide. There are 20 enemies in front of your that you’ll need to get through so that you can finish first. You don’t need to worry the slide is long enough to accommodate that. You simply need to dodge everyone. If you crash into them, you will move them in front of you and you don’t want to do that. You can try a trick, when you get to the edge of the slide, you can jump down and shorten your way. But you need to aim precisely, since if you miss, the game ends for you. So good luck!
instructions: Mouse - Movement
tags: Funny Games, Jumping Games, 3D Games, Roller Coaster Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games, IO Games

title: Touchdown!
description: Touchdown! is a funny online game where you’ll be playing American football. Your objective is to get as many points as you can and thus defeat your opponent. You can only do that by scoring a touchdown. You need to get the ball to the end of the playing field. Move around the playing field in such a way that you get the ball from your opponent or protect the ball in your possession. If you have a friend nearby, you can both play on one PC. It’s much more fun and you can see who the better player is. The game offers simple gameplay and pixelated 2D graphics that you’ll surely love. Come try the game out!
instructions: Arrow keys - Movement, WASD keys - Movement
tags: Funny Games, Sports Games, Two players games, American Football Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Lion Hunter
description: Lion Hunter is an action 3D game where you’ll be playing as a lion hunter. There are a few levels awaiting you where you’ll have a single goal on your mind, to kill dangerous animals and thus protect the jungle. Some lions only take one bullet to kill, other will need at least two. After the first shot, the lions will run towards you, so be ready. There are numerous levels where you won’t be in immediate danger, but you’ll still have to protect other animals like zebras. You need to fire as quickly as you can. Each level also has a time limit, so take care.
instructions: Mouse - Shooting
tags: Action Games, 3D Games, Shooting Games, Hunting Games, Animal Games, Sniper Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Wild Wolves
description: Wild Wolves is a 3D game, where you’ll be controlling a wild wolf. You will be trying to complete each level, with each level being a bit different. At the beginning, the game will be rather simple – follow the alpha. After that, you will need to hunt for prey or defend the pack from enemies. Read the instructions outlining the objective so that you always know what to do. There’s a time limit present for each level, so if you fail to finish it in that timeframe, you will have to repeat it. The game has average 3D graphics and the controls could be better, but it’s still a shame that the game only offers you 9 levels. Will you manage to complete all 9 of them at your first try?
instructions: Arrow keys - Movement, SHIFT - Sprint, Spacebar - Attack
tags: Action Games, 3D Games, Hunting Games, Wolf Games, Fighting Games, Animal Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Boat Rescue
description: Boat Rescue is a 3D game, where you’ll be trying to saving people stranded on and in buildings after a flood hit the city. Ride your boat and embark on that dangerous mission. Controlling the boat among all of the floating debris won’t be an easy task and you also need to get as close to a person as possible, so that he manages to float to your location. When you pick him up, try to get to a bigger boat as fast as possible, so professionals can take care of the survivors you bring them. You’ll have to work within a time limit, so be careful not to get stranded. It could very well happen that you’ll have to repeat the level if that happens. So come try the game out!
instructions: Arrow keys - Driving
tags: Action Games, 3D Games, Boat Games, Rescue Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Bird Flight
description: Bird Flight is a 3D online game, where you’ll be flying with a bird over beautiful landscapes. Your only objective will be to fly through the rings and to get as far as possible. At the beginning, this might seem very simple, but it will get progressively harder and harder with each level, since your reaction time will have to get slower and slower. Also dodge trees and other obstacles that can take one life away. Try to get the best score you can and overcome your previous high score. You can pick new skins in the menu, so come on, let’s try the game out!
instructions: Mouse - Movement
tags: 3D Games, Observation Games, Flying Games, Animal Games, HTML5 games, Bird Games, WebGL Games

title: Russian Train Simulator
description: Russian Train Simulator is yet another game from a long line of simulators that will let you be the train engineer. The game offers you three modes – training mode, people transport mode and cargo transport mode. Your objective is to reach the the station, wait for the people to get on, or the cargo to get loaded and then move them to the terminus station. Take care to stop before the red notification. If you stop after that, or you fail to finish before the time runs out, the game ends and you’ll have to repeat the whole level. Aside from that you can also change camera angles and have the camera from inside of the locomotive. That’s pretty realistic. Have fun!
instructions: Mouse - Interaction
tags: 3D Games, Traffic Games, Train Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Xtreme Monster Truck
description: In today’s online game Xtreme Monster Truck, you will be able to drive a few great vehicles. As is common in these games, you will have to get through a few demanding obstacles, so that you can reach the next level. On your way, you will have to get as many coins as possible that you can later use to unlock new vehicles. You have two worlds that you can choose from, together with 10 levels whose difficulty will be rising slowly, which means that you’ll be getting less and less time to complete everything. The speed isn’t everything since you’ll have to control your truck. So drive carefully. The game is offering you great 3D graphics, so be sure to try it out!
instructions: Arrow keys - Driving, Spacebar - Handbrake
tags: Car Games, 3D Games, Racing Games, Skill Games, Stunt Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Crazy Bull Attack
description: In today’s game, you will be working as a hunter. The city has called you after several bulls escaped into the streets and are smashing whatever they can find. Your objective is to start removing them and thus save the people living there. At the beginning there won’t be that many of them, but soon it will get harder for you to survive. Use the cash you earn to buy new weapons that will help you in your fight against these dangerous animals. The game is offering OK graphics and simple controls, so come on, try it out!
instructions: Mouse - Shooting, WASD keys - Movement, Spacebar - Jump, SHIFT - Sprint, P - Pause, L - Mouse lock
tags: Action Games, 3D Games, Shooting Games, Hunting Games, Animal Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Cash Transport Simulator
description: In today’s 3D game, you will be working as an employee of a bank. Your objective will be to drive money to ATMs at precise locations. You’ll be doing the same thing over and over – pick up the money at a bank. Get into the car. Start driving towards an ATM and put in the money. After that you need to drive your car to work and it’s over. Your colleague is always with you and will help you if you get attacked. While driving, try to be as careful as possible. All it takes is to crash into an innocent civilian and the game can end right afterwards. So come on and play!
instructions: Arrow keys - Movement, Spacebar - Handbrake, E - Enter the car, P - Pause, L - Mouse lock
tags: Car Games, 3D Games, Racing Games, Parking Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Dino Transport
description: Dino Transport is an interesting online game where you’ll be playing as a truck driver. Your main objective will be to get your dinosaurs to a local Zoo which won’t be easy at all. You will have to get through marked areas and park at the right spot. There’s a time limit present, so you won’t have unlimited time to do that. The game offers you three modes. You can just simply drive around, or move your dinosaurs. Then there’s the third mode, where it can get really dangerous. One dinosaur escaped from his cage and you’ll have to catch it. So catch him and get him to the finish line, else you’re finished. So come on, let’s play.
instructions: Arrow keys - Driving, Spacebar - Handbrake, C - Change camera, ESC - Pause
tags: Car Games, 3D Games, Parking Games, Truck Games, Dinosaur Games, Zoo Games, Animal Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Xtreme Demolition Arena Derby
description: Xtreme Demolition Arena Derby is yet another great game where you’ll be destroying enemy cars in an arena. In each level, there will be a kill count that you’ll have to fulfill, so that you win and move further up. Of course, you will be rewarded with money that you can later use to unlock new vehicles. There’s a total of 6 of them available. During the game, try not to crash into barrels, since they can explode and destroy your vehicle. Try to play tactically at first and push your enemies into them. If the game lags at first, you can use the settings to lower your quality.
instructions: Arrow keys - Driving, Spacebar - Handbrake, C - Change camera
tags: Car Games, 3D Games, Racing Games, Destroy Games, Arena Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Hungry Shark
description: Hungry Shark is a pretty rough game where you’ll be controlling a big shark. As the name suggests your objective will be to hunt down as many beach goers as you can. At the top of your screen is a kill count that you need to reach. You can eat both the people swimming and the people on boats. When they fall into the water you can attack them. Aside from that you can get a speed boosts for a while. You also need to take care to look at your time, since a longer period of not killing anyone could mean game over. Will you be able to get through all of the levels on your first try?
instructions: Arrow keys - Movement, W - Acceleration, P - Pause
tags: Action Games, Bloody Games, 3D Games, Shark Games, Hunting Games, Animal Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Crazy Demolition Derby V1
description: Crazy Demolition Derby V1 is a great game where you can try destroying many different vehicles. Of course, you are trying to destroy your opponents’ cars, not your own. These demolitions and wins will bring you more money that you can later use for buying upgrades and changing the style and power of your vehicle. You can also buy an entirely new car. Since this is a multiplayer game, you will be playing with real players, or even your friends if you invite them. The game offers you 3D graphics and fun gameplay, so don’t worry about getting bored. There can be up to 14 people in one lobby. Aside from that the game offers you 6 maps.
instructions: Arrow keys - Driving, Spacebar - Handbrake, B - Look back, C - Change camera, TAB - Statistics
tags: Car Games, 3D Games, Multiplayer Games, Racing Games, Destroy Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Hit Targets
description: Hit Targets is an online game where you’ll be using a sniper rifle. Your objective will be to hit all of the targets in a specific level. At the beginning this will be easy, since the objects will be very close to each other. Each level will rack up the difficulty a bit and with each level, the targets will be getting a bit smaller. The greater the distance between you and the target, the more you’ll scope will be moving. You also need to count with wind speed and direction. So in total, there’s 15 levels awaiting you. So come on, let’s play!
instructions: Left mouse button - Shooting, Right mouse button - Aim, 1 || 4 - Zoom, H - Hold breath, P - Pause
tags: Action Games, 3D Games, Shooting Games, Sniper Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Maze Cube
description: Maze Cube is a reflex focused game where you’ll be trying to get your ball into the maze and then out again. The problem is that you can only move forwards and there’s no way of stopping. Aside from that you cannot touch any of the walls of the maze, else the game ends and you’ll have to start again. The game has a single goal for you, to stay alive and to earn as many points as you can. Aside from that you can also try to pick up diamonds on your way. The graphics is really minimalistic, so don’t expect anything stellar. So come on, let’s play!
instructions: Arrow keys - Movement
tags: Funny Games, 3D Games, Observation Games, Maze Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Bus Parking Simulator
description: Bus Parking Simulator is a great game where you’ll be playing as a bus driver. Your objective will of course be to get through all of the obstacles and to get the bus to the highlighted place. Try to park as precisely as you can, else the game won’t count your try and you’ll have to repeat the level. There will be a total of 40 levels in 3D graphics awaiting you. If you have trouble controlling such a behemoth of a vehicle, you can switch to a roof camera view that will help you a bit. You can use the money you’ve earned in the store to buy a new bus. So come on, light up the engine and start driving!
instructions: Arrow keys - Driving, Spacebar - Handbreak, C - Change camera
tags: Car Games, 3D Games, Parking Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Russian Hill Driver
description: In today’s game, you will be playing as a Russian truck driver. Your objective will be to transport heavy cargo to a specified location. You first need to pick up the cargo and then follow the road signs that will lead you to your destination. There will be numerous obstacles waiting for you that you need to overcome, because if your cargo falls out of the truck, you’ll have to restart the level. When you get into your garage, you’ll be able to change your car’s color, or to buy entirely new car. It’s up to you. Later, you’ll be able to unlock the winter settings that are locked at the beginning of the game. So start up your car and let’s play!
instructions: Arrow keys - Driving, Spacebar - Brake, C - Change camera
tags: Car Games, 3D Games, Parking Games, Truck Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Billiard Tour
description: Billiard Tour is a great online game for all fans of billiard. In this game, you will be trying to become a professional player. To do so, you’ll have to get through a multitude of levels. There will always be a different number of balls and they will be put on the table differently. Your objective will be to get rid of all the balls. The problem is however, that you have a limited number of lives, which means that you can miss only a few times. Try to thus be as precise as you can, so that you hit everything on your first try, since you will lose lives if you don’t and you don’t want to repeat the level because of it. The money you earn can be used in the store to buy new equipment.
instructions: Mouse - Interaction
tags: Sports Games, Pool Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Football World Cup 2019
description: Today, we have a great 3D football game to offer to every sports fan. At the beginning of the game, you will pick your favorite team. There won’t be any classic clubs, but rather national teams. You can also pick the length of a match and the difficulty of the AI. You can then start up the match, where you’ll be trying to score as many goals as possible. If you pick the Hard AI difficulty, don’t forget to pass the ball as much as you can and to aim before shooting. If you don’t do that, your opponent will get the ball and it will be really difficult to take it from him. So come try the game out!
instructions: Arrow keys - Movement, Z || Y - Pass / slide tackle, X - Shooting
tags: Sports Games, 3D Games, Soccer Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Incredible Monster
description: In this game, you will be controlling a big, mutated monster that is trying to save the city. You will of course be helping it with its task. At the beginning of the game, you choose your color. At start, only green is available, but you can buy other colors for coins later in the game. There is a total of 4 different bigger missions. In each missions there are a few levels awaiting you, where you’ll be trying to kill all of your enemies. These enemies are marked with a red dot on the map. All you need to do is find them, fight them and win. At the beginning, these opponents won’t give you much of a fight, but later, their numbers will be growing and they’ll get stronger and stronger. Don’t forget your special attack and the fact that you can even throw a car at them. There’s also a time limit, so don’t slow down too much. Can you save the whole city?
instructions: Mouse - Attack, WASD keys - Movement, Spacebar - Jump, Q - Kick, E - Special attack, C - Vehicle lift / drop, M - Map, P - Pause
tags: Action Games, 3D Games, Fighting Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games, Super Hero Games

title: Penguins.io
description: Penguins.io is an addictive game where you control a small penguin fighting on an ice-berg. Your objective will be to push all of the other penguins off. If you become the last surviving penguin, you win. It’s sort of an icy battle royale. The one who survives last, wins. The iceberg will be getting smaller and smaller as individual pieces will begin to fall off. That’s why it’ll become increasingly difficult to defend against enemy attacks and to survive. You have no other chance than to attack first. All you need to do is point your penguin in the right direction and load up as much strength as you can. This way you can launch off more opponents at once.
instructions: Mouse - Movement
tags: Action Games, Funny Games, 3D Games, Penguin Games, Animal Games, Winter Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games, IO Games, Battle Royale Games

title: Ninja Cube
description: Ninja Cube is an online game in pixelated graphics where you’ll be controlling a ninja warrior. You just need to aim a bit and shoot him right up into the air. His advantage is that he can switch directions mid-air and attack an otherwise well-hidden enemy. Try to collect all shurrikens so that you get awarded all of the available stars. The main goal of this game is to find the princess who has been taken prisoner. So come on, start playing!
instructions: Mouse - Interaction
tags: Action Games, Ninja Games, Rescue Games, Fighting Games, Collection Games, HTML5 games

title: Ambulance Driver
description: Ambulance Driver is a 3D game, where you’ll be controlling an ambulance. Your objective will be to get the paramedics to the precise location of the accident. After picking up the patients, you will be driving them to the hospital based on the locations given to you. The city is huge, so you could get lost without your trusty map. To add to the stress, there’s a time limit to each level. If you fail, you’ll have to repeat the level. You also must not crash during your driving session. The is offering you 10 levels and lower end graphics. So sit in your ambulance and save lives!
instructions: Arrow keys - Driving, Spacebar - Brake
tags: Car Games, 3D Games, Racing Games, Parking Games, Flying Games, Helicopter Games, Hospital Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games

title: Apocalypse World
description:
Zombie apocalypse is upon us and most of humanity is already dead. Most of those who aren’t dead have turned into bloodthirsty zombies. Few survivors, however, are immune to the disease. These people don’t have it easy, since they need to fight for their lives all day long. Your hero is one of those people and you’ll need to help him survive in this inhospitable land. To survive, try to look for empty buildings and water sources. Avoid zombies that can attack you at any moment. Try to move slowly in a car or a motorbike, since you can cover more ground this way and it won’t be as dangerous as going on foot. 
 
 The game includes: 
 * Driving bikes, cars and riding horses
 * Flying on a glider
 * Fighting the zombies
 * A big, open world.
instructions: Mouse - Shooting, WASD keys - Movement, SHIFT - Sprint, E - Interaction, F - Get off the horse, CTRL - Crouch, 1 || 2 - Change weapon, P - Pause, L - Mouse lock
tags: Action Games, Car Games, 3D Games, Shooting Games, Zombie Games, Horse Games, Animal Games, HTML5 games, WebGL Games, Survival games

title: Forest Hunter
description: In today’s game, you’ll be playing as a hunter who will be trying to catch a certain number of game. Right at the beginning you can choose what type of animal you want to hunt for. There are six options to choose and the harder to catch types include rabbits and ducks. You need to be careful around wolves, who will attack you right after you fire your gun. There are difficulty levels to choose that come with each animal, but if you start lowering them, the reward will be smaller. Try to earn as much money as you can to buy new guns at the store.
